Data source: WO_Central Google Sheet. An embedded verified snapshot (5833 WOs) renders instantly; the dashboard then pulls live data when the browser allows it (use Refresh). Mappings, normalisation (Major/Minor/Unspecified, Buddhist-Era→CE) and calculations are derived from the WO_Central sheet.
